name: mistral
description: Generate chat completions and embeddings with Mistral models via the Mistral AI API

envVars.name: MISTRAL_API_KEY
envVars.description: Mistral AI API key from the La Plateforme console

tools.name: List Models
tools.description: List the Mistral models available to the API key

historicalSummary.omitted: model capability details and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Model
tools.description: Get details about a specific Mistral model

model.description: Model ID, e.g. mistral-large-latest or mistral-small-latest

tools.name: Create Chat Completion
tools.description: Generate a chat completion from a list of messages

model.description: Model ID to use, e.g. mistral-large-latest

messages.description: Chat messages, each with role (system|user|assistant) and content

tools.name: Create Embedding
tools.description: Create embedding vectors for input text

input.description: Array of texts to embed, e.g. ["Text to embed"]

prompts.title: List Mistral models
prompts.prompt: List the Mistral models available to my API key and summarize what each is best for.

prompts.title: Generate a response
prompts.prompt: Use Mistral to generate a chat completion for a prompt I provide.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Mistral AI API Setup

steps.title: Create a Mistral account
steps.description: Go to https://console.mistral.ai and sign up or sign in to La Plateforme. Activate a workspace and add billing under Billing, or use the free Experiment tier where available.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Open https://console.mistral.ai/api-keys, click 'Create new key', and give it a descriptive name (e.g. 'Veryfront Integration').

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Copy the key immediately — it is only shown once. Add it to your .env file as MISTRAL_API_KEY=...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Models tool to confirm the key works. A 401 means the key is invalid or the workspace is not activated.

notes: API usage is billed per token — chat completion and embedding tools cost money on paid tiers
Keys are workspace-scoped; rotate them from the console at any time
